message:
fix(store): enable SQLite foreign keys per-connection so CASCADE deletes work (#6905) (#6906)

The DSN-level _pragma=foreign_keys(on) is parsed by modernc.org/sqlite
on driver.Open(), but recycled pool connections can skip enforcement.
Wrap the driver in a custom sql/driver.Connector (fkConnector) that
executes PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON on every freshly-opened physical
connection, guaranteeing referential integrity across the entire pool
lifecycle.  This prevents orphaned "ghost cards" when dashboards are
deleted.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
